classes.name: vegetation_cover
classes.description: Visible grass, pasture, or healthy vegetation cover.

classes.name: bare_soil
classes.description: Exposed soil with little or no vegetation.

classes.name: waterlogged_soil
classes.description: Wet, muddy, saturated, or water-covered soil.

classes.name: degraded_area
classes.description: Damaged or unhealthy pasture or soil region.

classes.name: overgrazed_area
classes.description: Area with very sparse vegetation caused by grazing pressure.

classes.name: suitable_grazing_area
classes.description: Area with healthy vegetation and acceptable grazing condition.
